name: Blog Post from Outline
description: Expand a topic or bullet-point outline into a full blog post with two LLM passes

config.userPrompt:
Given the topic or outline below, produce a detailed section-by-section outline for a blog post.
Requirements:
- 4 to 6 main sections with clear H2 headings.
- 2-3 bullet sub-points per section noting what to cover.
- Include an intro hook and a conclusion section.
- Return the outline only — no prose yet.

TOPIC OR OUTLINE:
{{INPUT}}

Expand the following blog post outline into a full, well-written blog post.
Requirements:
- Write each section with 2-4 paragraphs of engaging prose.
- Use the H2 headings from the outline.
- Keep the tone informative but approachable — avoid jargon unless necessary.
- Begin with a compelling 2-sentence hook.
- End with a conclusion that summarizes the key insight and includes a call to action.
- Use markdown formatting.

OUTLINE:
{{INPUT}}
